RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SH LUNG 2SF LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BROOKS, ROBERTA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SH LUNG 2SF LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROOKS, ROBERTA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1693 MCKINNON AVENUE, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT** SEE SCAN**
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF SH LUNG 2SF LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BROOKS, ROBERTA
DECLARATION OF FLORENCE FUNG IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY [CCP 585] IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SH LUNG 2SF LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SH LUNG 2SF LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROOKS, ROBERTA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT-ISSUE $3,200.00 RENT, $1,200.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $620.00 COSTS, $5,333.00 HOLDOVER CHARGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,353.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
